payload.label: window
payload.long_description: Rectangular dark window with highly reflective glass showing an interior reflection (lamp, chair, staircase banister and a faint human silhouette); light-colored frame appears worn/chipped and is partially cut off by the crop, and the glass surface looks slightly smudged — approximately 2.5 meters from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"window","short_description":"dark reflective window, partial frame","long_description":"Rectangular dark window with highly reflective glass showing an interior reflection (lamp, chair, staircase banister and a faint human silhouette); light-colored frame appears worn/chipped and is partially cut off by the crop, and the glass surface looks slightly smudged — approximately 2.5 meters from the camera.","attributes":["dark reflective glass","interior reflection","visible lamp reflection","staircase banister reflection","faint human silhouette","light-colored chipped frame","frame partially cut off","smudged/dirty glass","rectangular shape"],"distance_from_camera_m":2.5}
